summary: LEARN → TODAY integration testing completed. Backend APIs all working (13/13 tests passed). Frontend fixed and verified - LearnNudgeCard displays correctly when nudge available. Fixed React StrictMode double-fetch race condition using AbortController.

minor.issue: Backend logs nudge as 'shown' before frontend confirms render - causes premature cooldown in double-fetch scenarios. Consider deferred logging or ACK mechanism.

action_items: Consider adding nudge acknowledgment API to confirm user actually saw the nudge before starting cooldown
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: TodayPanel.jsx fetchLearnNudge() had StrictMode double-fetch race condition - now uses AbortController
seed_data_creation: Used existing test pet pet-e6348b13c975 (Lola) with learn events
context_for_next_testing_agent: LEARN → TODAY integration working. LearnNudgeCard displays in TODAY panel when user completes Learn items with service mappings. 7-day cooldown is aggressive - nudge only shows once per 7 days per pet. To test again, clear today_nudge_log collection for the pet. Primary action opens ServiceRequestBuilder, secondary opens ConciergePanel, dismiss removes card.

features_tested.GET /api/os/learn/today-nudge: PASS - Returns nudge with service mapping, respects cooldown
features_tested.LearnNudgeCard display: PASS - Shows in TODAY panel with correct content
features_tested.Primary action (Book service): VERIFIED in UI - Button present and labeled correctly
features_tested.Secondary action (Ask Mira): VERIFIED in UI - Button present and labeled correctly
features_tested.Dismiss action: VERIFIED in UI - X button present
